title: senecio oreinus
intro: Senecio oreinus, also known as Senecio orcinus or Mountain Ragwort, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Senecio oreinus include its ability to aid in respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Senecio oreinus is often prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
